## ExternalsPresetContext.environmentName property

The Rsbuild environment being resolved (e.g. `'lynx'`<!-- -->, `'web'`<!-- -->).

**Signature:**

```typescript
environmentName?: string;
```

## Remarks

Presets use this to pick environment-specific artifacts — for example the built-in `reactlynx` preset resolves the web-encoded `react.web.bundle` for the `web` environment and `react.lynx.bundle` otherwise.
